examples.title: LRU Page Replacement
examples.description: Implements Least Recently Used policy using counter
examples.code:
ALGORITHM LRU_Replacement
BEGIN
  FOR each page access:
    IF page not in memory:
      IF frames full:
        FIND page with oldest access time
        REPLACE it
      LOAD new page
    UPDATE access timestamps
END
examples.explanation: Tracks last access time for each page, replaces oldest when needed
